title: Count Primes up to N
description: Count the number of prime numbers less than or equal to N. A naive O(N√N) solution works for small N, but an O(N log log N) sieve wins in Optimization mode.

botCodes.code: let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in if n<2 then print_int 0 else begin let s=Array.make(n+1)true in s.(0)<-false;s.(1)<-false;let i=ref 2 in while !i * !i<=n do if s.(!i) then begin let j=ref(!i * !i) in while !j<=n do s.(!j)<-false;j:= !j + !i done end;incr i done;let c=Array.fold_left(fun a x->if x then a+1 else a)0 s in Printf.printf"%d\n" c end
